meta.description: Smell index for Filament admin panels. Each smell references rubric.json by rule_ref.

smells.name: Bloated Filament resource
smells.summary: One class owns enormous table, form, pages, and relation managers.

smells.name: Navigation vs policy mismatch
smells.summary: Hidden navigation but permissive policy or the reverse.

smells.name: Per-cell database queries
smells.summary: Column formatters run queries per row.

smells.name: Missing eager loads for relation columns
smells.summary: Dot-notation columns without with() on the table query.

smells.name: Table defaults weak for large data
smells.summary: No default sort or pagination strategy for big tables.

smells.name: Tenancy leak: scope removal
smells.summary: withoutGlobalScopes or missing tenant predicate on panel query.

smells.name: Tenancy leak: tenant from request
smells.summary: Tenant id taken from unvalidated request input.

smells.name: Heavy synchronous action
smells.summary: HTTP, mail, or long work inside Filament action closure.

smells.name: Unauthorised custom action
smells.summary: Mutating action without policy or gate check.

smells.name: Duplicated action logic
smells.summary: Same bulk/table action copied across resources.

smells.name: Fat form schema / side effects
smells.summary: Huge form() or afterStateUpdated doing I/O or many writes.

smells.name: Excessive live fields
smells.summary: Many live() fields without debounce or blur strategy.

smells.name: Unbounded repeater / relationship form
smells.summary: Repeater or relationship UI can load unbounded children.

smells.name: Incomplete model policy for Filament
smells.summary: Policy missing viewAny/view/create/update/delete used by Filament.

smells.name: Resource can* vs Policy drift
smells.summary: Resource overrides canCreate/canEdit out of sync with Policy.

smells.name: Positive: deliberate eager loads
smells.summary: with()/withCount() on table query — good practice signal.
